title: Complete link vectors and stale interop tests
description: Fix the signed frame vector’s incorrect declared fields, make cross-language vector tests compare complete bytes/fields, update the live Rust interop fixture for no-MIC unsigned frames, and add independent known signed-frame coverage where an authoritative vector is available.
close_reason: Corrected signed vector fields, strengthened Rust/Python/C byte and payload/MIC checks, updated unsigned live fixture, and added authoritative signed-frame coverage.
